grundy2007

Source: R/manCTMed-grundy2007.R
grundy2007.Rd

grundy2007

Usage

data(grundy2007)

Format

A dataframe with 4123 rows and 5 columns:

id

Participant ID variable.

time

Time variable

x

Mother-reported marital conflict.

m

Maternal knowledge.

y

Child-reported behavioral competence.

References

Grundy, A. M., Gondoli, D. M., & Blodgett Salafia, E. H. (2007). Marital conflict and preadolescent behavioral competence: Maternal knowledge as a longitudinal mediator. Journal of Family Psychology, 21 (4), 675–682. doi:10.1037/0893-3200.21.4.675

Author

Ivan Jacob Agaloos Pesigan
